pairs.question: How many consecutive seasons had Orange County SC played in the USL Championship before the 2023 season?
pairs.answer: Orange County SC had played thirteen consecutive seasons in the USL Championship before the 2023 season.

pairs.question: What was Orange County SC's record in their first eight games of the 2023 season?
pairs.answer: Orange County SC had a record of 1 win, 4 losses, and 3 draws (1-4-3) in their first eight games of the 2023 season.

pairs.question: Who became the interim head coach of Orange County SC in May 2023, and what was their role before the promotion?
pairs.answer: Morten Karlsen became the interim head coach of Orange County SC in May 2023. Before the promotion, he was the newly hired assistant coach.

pairs.question: How did Orange County SC's final position in the Western Conference change under Morten Karlsen's management?
pairs.answer: Under Morten Karlsen's management, Orange County SC improved from 11th to 2nd place in the Western Conference, finishing the season with a final record of 17 wins, 11 losses, and 6 draws (17–11–6).

pairs.question: What was the outcome of Orange County SC's first playoff match in the 2023 USL Championship playoffs?
pairs.answer: Orange County SC won their first playoff match against El Paso Locomotive FC with a 1–0 victory at home, with a goal from Forward Milan Iloski.

pairs.question: In which round did Orange County SC lose to Phoenix Rising FC in the 2023 USL Championship playoffs, and what was the score?
pairs.answer: Orange County SC lost to Phoenix Rising FC in the semifinals of the 2023 USL Championship playoffs. The score was 2–1 in extra time.

pairs.question: What notable individual achievement did Milan Iloski accomplish during the 2023 season, and what happened to his status with the club afterward?
pairs.answer: Milan Iloski was the team-leading goalscorer and was selected for the All-League Second Team during the 2023 season. After the season, he transferred to FC Nordsjælland in the Danish Superliga in the January transfer window.

pairs.question: What was the final coaching appointment for Morten Karlsen at Orange County SC after the 2023 season?
pairs.answer: After the 2023 season, on November 10, Morten Karlsen was officially signed as the head coach of Orange County SC.
